title: Fit test - All screens are properly translated to different languages
scenario: Fit Test feature screens show untranslated text when phone language is changed on Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Change the phone system language to the target language (e.g., French, German, Japanese, etc.).
2. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app with a supported Poly Bluetooth audio device connected.
3. On the Home screen, tap the Tutorial screen or navigate to the Fit Test feature from the device settings.
4. Tap Fit Test to open the Fit Test screen.
5. Complete a successful fit test (e.g., insert earbuds properly and follow on-screen prompts until completion).
6. Observe all text displayed during the successful fit test flow (instructions, status messages, completion message).
7. Complete a failed fit test (e.g., remove earbuds or block the seal to trigger a failure).
8. Observe all text displayed during the failed fit test flow (error messages, retry prompts, failure notification).
expected: All text on every screen of the Fit Test feature (Tutorial, in-test instructions, success result, failure result) is properly translated into the target language with no untranslated strings, truncation, or encoding issues.
